description: Data Integrity Risk: Detect silent corruption, mapping errors, and partial-write hazards.

fixtures.notes: Updates 3 fields of a record in 3 separate DB calls with no transaction, risking partial-write corruption.
Maps incoming DTO to entity but silently drops the auditFields sub-object, losing audit trail data.
Wraps all DB updates in a transaction with proper rollback on any exception — data integrity preserved.
Entity mapper explicitly maps every field including audit metadata — no data is dropped.
Uses a transaction but catches the exception and commits anyway on a specific error code, defeating rollback.
